services.title: Engineering Design Support
services.summary: In-house engineers and consulting engineers support scaffolding and formwork design drawings, material calculations, and technically challenging project layouts.

services.title: Production and Fabrication
services.summary: GOWE combines R&D, production, sales, rental, and construction services across formwork, scaffolding, steel structure, bridge and tunnel equipment, and building materials.

services.title: Construction Technical Guidance
services.summary: Technical guidance can be provided after purchase according to project schedule, with support typically aligned to a defined period or standard floor cycle.

services.title: Rental and Purchase Options
services.summary: GOWE offers rental and purchase options for scaffolding and formwork systems so contractors can align procurement with budget and project duration.

services.title: Localized Overseas Service
services.summary: Overseas branches and localized service teams in Southeast Asia support regional contractors, developers, distributors, and agents with tailored project solutions.

solutions.title: Consult and Design
solutions.targetScenario: Early-stage project planning and temporary works design
solutions.summary: A consulting and design workflow for contractors that need scaffold and formwork layouts, material quantity estimates, and constructability support before ordering.

solutions.title: Production
solutions.targetScenario: Manufacturing formwork, scaffolding, steel structure, and bridge or tunnel equipment
solutions.summary: Integrated production capability supports standardized and customized construction systems from formwork and scaffolding to steel structures and bridge equipment.

solutions.title: Construction
solutions.targetScenario: On-site use of scaffolding, formwork, and protection systems
solutions.summary: Construction-stage support helps project teams apply GOWE systems efficiently and safely in residential, public, industrial, infrastructure, and special building projects.

solutions.title: Operation
solutions.targetScenario: Lifecycle operation of repeatable construction system assets
solutions.summary: Operation-oriented support connects product selection, rental, logistics, reuse, and regional service for contractors managing multiple construction phases.

solutions.title: Service
solutions.targetScenario: Localized support for builders, contractors, developers, distributors, and agents
solutions.summary: A service model for global construction partners that need localized response, product guidance, and one-stop formwork and scaffolding support.

faqs.title: Do you provide design drawings?
faqs.summary: Yes. GOWE has in-house engineers and consulting engineers who can design scaffolding and formwork solutions, calculate material quantities, and support challenging project requirements.

faqs.title: Can you introduce GOWE Group briefly?
faqs.summary: GOWE Group is a long-established supplier of formwork and scaffolding systems, construction equipment, building materials, and engineering solutions with integrated R&D, production, sales, and rental.

faqs.title: Can GOWE provide examples of successful construction projects?
faqs.summary: Yes. GOWE cites projects including convention centers, bridges, subways, tunnels, the China and Thailand Railway, Beijing Daxing Airport, and Tianjin PingTai Skyscraper.

faqs.title: What certifications do GOWE products have?
faqs.summary: GOWE cites ISO 9001, ISO 14001, OHSAS 18001, EN 1090-2, and EN 12811 certification coverage for quality, environmental, occupational safety, steel structure, and ringlock scaffolding systems.

faqs.title: Can GOWE provide custom solutions?
faqs.summary: Yes. GOWE provides tailored scaffolding and formwork systems based on project needs, using technical design and construction experience to improve efficiency and cost effectiveness.

faqs.title: Can GOWE provide technical guidance after purchase?
faqs.summary: Yes. Technical guidance can be provided according to project schedule, typically within a defined project period or standard floor scope.

faqs.title: Does GOWE offer rental services for scaffolding and formwork?
faqs.summary: Yes. GOWE offers both rental and purchase options so customers can match system procurement to budget and project duration.

faqs.title: What is the lead time for scaffolding delivery?
faqs.summary: Lead times vary based on product availability and project scope. GOWE asks customers to contact the team for an accurate timeline.

audiencePersonas.title: International Contractor Procurement Manager
audiencePersonas.summary: Evaluates formwork, scaffolding, steel structure, and temporary works suppliers for overseas projects where quality, delivery, certification, and localized support affect project risk.

audiencePersonas.title: Formwork and Scaffolding Distributor
audiencePersonas.summary: Needs a credible manufacturer partner with broad product coverage, catalog-ready materials, rental or sales flexibility, and responsive regional support.

audiencePersonas.title: Project or Structural Engineering Manager
audiencePersonas.summary: Needs technical details, design support, load and safety evidence, drawing workflows, and practical guidance for applying systems on complex construction sites.

audiencePersonas.title: Infrastructure Developer or EPC Lead
audiencePersonas.summary: Looks for project-proof, lifecycle support, local service coverage, and integrated solutions for bridge, tunnel, rail, metro, high-rise, and industrial construction.
